raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Hemp-derived CBD does not produce a high because it contains only trace amounts of THC (less than 0.3 percent).",
    "AB 45 caps the amount of THC in any hemp product at 0.3 percent.",
    "Consumers in California have been seeking out hemp-derived CBD for relief from pain, inflammation, anxiety, insomnia, and other conditions.",
    "Many seniors prefer using hemp CBD because they do not want to visit a marijuana dispensary.",
    "AB 45 establishes a rigorous system for testing and labeling hemp CBD products.",
    "AB 45 aims to ensure that hemp CBD products consumed in California are clearly labeled and non-intoxicating.",
    "The passage of AB 45 is expected to make a meaningful difference for hemp farmers, small businesses, and product consumers.",
    "AB 45 establishes a comprehensive framework for the manufacture and sale of hemp products in California.",
    "The implementation of AB 45 will create opportunities for California farmers, manufacturers, and retailers in the hemp industry."
  ]
```
